name: M9 刺刀（★） | 虎牙
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been anodized orange and hand-etched in a tiger stripe pattern. Like the tiger it is rare... like the tiger it is deadly...
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这把武器配上虎纹图案进行了橙黄电镀处理和手工蚀刻。 如虎般珍稀… 如虎般致命…
